_publications._publicationTitle: Forward genetic screen for malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor formation identifies new genes and pathways driving tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: T2/Onc fusion transcripts led to increased Foxr2 mRNA and protein expression in tumors and tumor-derived cell lines
